plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: End-to-end feature pipeline: PRD -> SPEC -> execute with TDD gates. Bundles create-prd, create-spec, spec-to-work, execute-work-orchestration, execute-task, polish, and wrap skills along with cto, devils-advocate, spec-reviewer, and feature-planner agents.

plugins.name: markdown-review
plugins.description: Markdown comment review skill that opens a document in a browser for block-level commenting and writes a sidecar JSON file.
